seoTitle: Goowarra vs Gordon Park — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Goowarra and Gordon Park. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Goowarra vs Gordon Park: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Goowarra and Gordon Park.
heading: Goowarra vs Gordon Park — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Goowarra, Queensland and Gordon Park, Queensland. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Gordon Park has a lower overall climate risk score (34/100) compared to Goowarra (36/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Goowarra or Gordon Park safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Goowarra has a flood risk score of 34/100, while Gordon Park scores 32/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Goowarra scores 63/100 for bushfire risk. Gordon Park scores 27/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Goowarra or Gordon Park?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Gordon Park has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.83% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
